rationale: Driver aborts on stream write precondition failure during bulk op; internal stability bug, no spec rule violated.
Collation spec requires drivers to raise error on unsupported servers; driver silently ignores collation in command helpers.
Redundant internal handling of $query in cursor code; code-quality cleanup with no spec behavior change.
minPoolSize bugs in mongoc_client_pool (C-specific client pool, not CMAP connection pool); internal implementation bug.
Compiler warning for OpenSSL on mingw-w64; build/compiler issue with no spec involvement.
Adding ARM64 Evergreen CI builds for libbson; CI/build infrastructure only.
Adding POWER8 Ubuntu builds to Evergreen CI; CI/build infrastructure only.
Swapped 'connection timeout'/'connection error' diagnostic strings in topology scanner; internal error message bug, no spec rule.
count_with_opts ignores flags and read_prefs; specs require read preference to be honored on all CRUD operations.
Flaky CI test in aggregate/legacy/batch_size; test reliability issue, no driver spec behavior change.
Test hardcoded server error code 16436 changed to 40324 per SERVER-25038; test update for server-side change.
Driver used 'storage'/'wiredtiger' keys but server expects 'storageEngine'; internal API option naming bug, no cross-driver spec.
Update performance benchmark output format for Evergreen visualization; tooling/CI improvement only.
Timing bug in topology scanner: async command expiration miscalculated when blocking stream initiator is used; internal impl bug.
bson_malloc() doesn't guard zero-length allocation like bson_malloc0 does; internal memory handling bug.
Spec explicitly requires writeErrors always present as empty array on success; absent after legacy bulk opcode path.
Improve per-symbol visibility configuration for CMake+gcc/clang builds; build/packaging improvement only.
clang fallback exports private mongoc_ symbols due to missing --version-script support; ABI/build bug only.
MaxStaleness test assertion failure on Solaris 32-bit; CI/platform flakiness, not a driver behavior bug.
Swapped ternary for 'connection error'/'connection timeout' diagnostic message; internal error message bug, no spec rule.
ismaster_ssl test aborts on Solaris 32-bit; CI/platform stability issue, no spec behavior involved.
SDAM spec mandates minimum 500ms between ismaster calls; driver uses MIN instead of MAX, allowing shorter intervals.
Documentation incorrectly describes what mongoc_collection_get_last_error returns; docs-only fix.
URI parsing silently accepts invalid w < -1 instead of failing; connection string and write concern specs require validation.
Remove --enable-hardening configure option that was never applied; build cleanup only.
Remove deprecated autoIndexId validation following SERVER-19067; API cleanup, no spec behavior.
Move mongoc_handshake_data_append documentation to header; docs-only fix.
Replace bulk API functions with better-named variants for ergonomics; API design improvement, not a spec violation.
Backport of CDRIVER-1571 fix to 1.3 branch; release/backport task only.
Backport of CDRIVER-1567 fix to 1.3 branch; release/backport task only.
find_with_opts rejects valid $slice projection operator due to BSON_VALIDATE_DOLLAR_KEYS; CRUD spec permits $ projection operators.
Add trace log message for selected server host/port; logging feature request, no spec behavior change.
Server Selection spec says PossiblePrimary is effectively Unknown; driver incorrectly treats it as candidate for primary reads.
Documentation for bson_iter_recurse incorrectly states iter may go bad; docs-only fix.
rand() unseeded causes all new processes to pick same server initially; implementation quality issue, no specific spec rule on RNG seeding.
readPreferenceTags not validated during URI parsing; connection string spec requires rejecting invalid tag formats.
Adding regression test for limit behavior with legacy writes; test-only addition, no driver behavior change.
SCRAM-SHA-1 uses raw CC_SHA1 which may not be FIPS compliant on Darwin; auth implementation quality issue, no spec rule.
Segfault in test suite under specific build flags; test infrastructure bug only.
Missing tests/release_files folder in 1.5.0-rc2 release archive; packaging/release bug only.
Document that timeout_msec parameter in GridFS read/write is unused; docs-only fix, not a behavior change.
Configure libbson with --enable-extra-align=no when bundled with mongoc; build configuration only.
libbson unit tests timeout under -fsanitize=address due to threading; test infrastructure/tooling issue only.
GridFS spec requires MD5 checksum to be updated after write; driver fails to update md5 field.
POWER8 test failures in ismaster_ssl and server_selection/errors tests; CI/platform failures only.
Spurious /TLS/commonName test failure on Windows; test reliability issue, no spec behavior involved.
New header files missing from Debian 1.4.1 package; packaging/release bug only.
CRUD operations set inconsistent error domains (MONGOC_ERROR_COMMAND vs MONGOC_ERROR_QUERY) for the same failure; spec requires consistent error classification.
Shared memory /dev/shm/mongoc-$PID uses predictable name without O_EXCL; security implementation bug, no spec rule.
Improve error message for invalid update documents to include key name; UX/ergonomics improvement only.
